title: Off-by-one test assertion
description: Break a passing test by changing an assertion value with an off-by-one error

mutation.description: Change an expected array length by +1 in an assertion

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect failing test via T->C sweep

title: Missing @req annotation from test
description: Remove a @req annotation from a test file, breaking traceability

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect T->R gap for untraced test

title: Test file with no @req annotations
description: Create a test file with valid tests but no @req traceability

mutation.description: Create test file without any @req annotations

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect T->R gap for entire test file

title: Wrong expected value in test assertion
description: Change a test's expected output to an incorrect value

mutation.description: Change expected return value in an assertion

title: Duplicate test with slightly different description
description: Duplicate a test with a slightly different name but identical logic — dead test detection

mutation.description: Copy an existing test block with modified description string

title: Race condition in async test
description: Introduce a missing await in an async test creating a race condition

mutation.description: Remove await from an async test callback

title: Test passing but testing wrong behavior
description: Modify a test so it passes but tests incorrect behavior (false positive)

mutation.description: Change assertion to test wrong property (passes but meaningless)

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve may detect semantic drift between test intent and formal invariant

title: Test with hardcoded absolute path
description: Add a test that uses a hardcoded absolute path, making it machine-dependent

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect portability issue or test failure

title: Test dependency ordering issue
description: Create a test that depends on side effects from another test in the same file

mutation.description: Add test that reads state set by preceding test without proper isolation

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect test isolation violation

title: Test suite with coverage hole
description: Create a test suite where removing any single test still passes — coverage hole

mutation.description: Remove unique assertions from tests so each test is redundant

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect that tests don't provide unique coverage
